name: wibaek-code-review
description: Evidence-based wibaek review workflows for lightweight Git diffs, broad code/system/architecture reviews, and deep six-subagent reviews.

interface.longDescription: Wibaek Code Review packages reusable read-only workflows for lightweight PR diffs, broad code/system/architecture reviews, deep six-subagent reviews, validation, and impact analysis.
defaultPrompt: Run an engineering review on this PR, commit, branch diff, or working-tree patch.
Run an engineering review on this repository or scoped path.
Run a deep six-subagent engineering review on this repository.
